message:
🐛 Fix namespace manager caching and UI improvements (#461)

- Use local agent directly for namespace fetching (bypasses backend auth)
- Fix caching to not store empty arrays on failure
- Remove redundant "Cluster offline - cannot fetch namespaces" message
- Show error only when ALL clusters fail (not partial failures)
- Make Create button smaller and more consistent
- Filter offline clusters from create namespace dialog

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
